title: arundarbor balcooa
intro: Arundarbor balcooa, also known as the 'Bark of the White Sandalwood', is a plant native to the tropical regions of Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia, belonging to the genus Santalum. Its medicinal properties include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing stress, improving respiratory problems, and aiding in digestion. Arundarbor balcooa can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used for topical and internal applications.
